get.description: Returns the resolved configuration for the authenticated client's project. Supports ETag-based caching with If-None-Match.
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream that delivers real-time configuration updates for the authenticated client's project.
Returns OK to indicate the client API is reachable.
Returns a paginated list of audit records with optional filters for entity type, entity ID, performer, and date range.
Returns an audit record by its unique identifier.

post.description: Creates a new API client with credentials for accessing project configurations.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of clients for the specified project.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a client by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing client. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a client. Requires an If-Match header.

post.description: Creates a new configuration entry with a key, scoped values, and optional sensitivity flag.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of configuration entries. Optionally decrypts sensitive values.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a configuration entry by its unique identifier. Optionally decrypts sensitive values. Includes an ETag header.

put.description: Updates an existing configuration entry. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a configuration entry. Requires an If-Match header.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of user groups.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a group by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing group. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a group if it has no dependents. Requires an If-Match header.

get.description: Returns all users that are members of the specified group.

put.summary: Add or update a group member
put.description: Adds a user to the group or updates their membership role.

delete.description: Removes a user from the specified group.

post.description: Generates a new personal access token for API authentication. The raw token is only returned once.

get.description: Returns all personal access tokens owned by the current user.
Returns metadata for a personal access token owned by the current user.

delete.description: Permanently revokes a personal access token owned by the current user.

post.description: Creates a new project for organizing configuration entries and snapshots.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of projects.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a project by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing project. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a project if it has no dependents. Requires an If-Match header.

put.summary: Add a template to a project
put.description: Associates a template with the specified project. Requires an If-Match header.

delete.summary: Remove a template from a project
delete.description: Removes a template association from the specified project. Requires an If-Match header.

post.description: Creates a new role with a set of permissions.

get.description: Returns all available roles.
Returns a role by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing role. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a role if it is not assigned to any users. Requires an If-Match header.

post.description: Creates a new scope definition with a dimension name, allowed values, and optional description.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of scope definitions.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a scope by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing scope. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a scope if it is not referenced by any configuration entries. Requires an If-Match header.

post.description: Resolves the project's current configuration entries and templates into a point-in-time snapshot.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of snapshots for the specified project.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

post.description: Sets the specified snapshot as the active configuration for its project, notifying connected clients.

get.description: Returns a snapshot by its unique identifier. Optionally decrypts sensitive values.
Returns a paginated list of configuration templates.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

get.description: Returns a template by its unique identifier. Includes an ETag header for optimistic concurrency.

put.description: Updates an existing template. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a template if it is not referenced by any projects. Requires an If-Match header.

post.description: Creates a new user account. In BuiltIn authentication mode, also creates the identity with a password.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users.

parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

get.description: Returns a user by their unique identifier. Accessible to the user themselves or users with read permission.

put.description: Updates a user's profile. Admin fields require write permission. Requires an If-Match header.

delete.description: Deletes a user account. Requires an If-Match header.

put.description: Changes the password for the specified user. Only available to the user themselves in BuiltIn authentication mode.

post.description: Creates a new variable for use in template interpolation.

get.description: Returns a variable by its unique identifier. Optionally decrypts sensitive values. Includes an ETag header.

put.description: Updates an existing variable. Requires an If-Match header with the current ETag value.

delete.description: Deletes a variable if it is not referenced by any templates. Requires an If-Match header.
